name: YoloLiv YoloMax All in One Live Streaming Solution with 32" Touchscreen
description: The YoloMax features two HDMI, a USB-C input, multiple USB-A inputs, and one HDMI output for viewing your stream on a second local display. Its native integration with Instagram and TikTok makes it easy to get up and running quickly, and it is designed to allow you to use external cameras when streaming, such as the optional YoloLiv 1080p PTZ camera.

features.Key Features: Encoder, Monitor, Recorder, Switcher | Intuitive 32" Touchscreen LCD Display | Stream via Ethernet, Wi-Fi, 4G LTE | Stream at up to 1080p60, Supports H.264 | 2 HDMI & USB-A /C Inputs, 1 HDMI Output | Supports H.264/MP4 up to 1080p Video | Built-In Chroma Key, 1 x SD Card Input | Lower-Thirds/Graphic Overlays/Countdown | Picture-in-Picture & Transition Effects | Add Logos/Comments to the Stream
features.What's In The Box: 1x Power Cable | 1x Power Adapter | 1x 4G Antenna | 1x Wi-Fi Antenna | 1x Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
